title: Threatening to upload woman's private video amounts to criminal intimidation: Supreme Court
description: The Supreme Court recently upheld the conviction of a man for criminal intimidation after he threatened to upload a woman’s bathing video on Facebook if she continued asking him to marry her [Vijayakumar v. State of Tamil Nadu]. A Bench of Justices Sanjay Karol and NK Singh held that threatening to publish intimate visuals of a woman online amounts to imputing unchastity under Part II of Section 506 (criminal intimidation) of the Indian Penal Code (IPC). “There can be no doub
